recent_top5.description: TASK ORDER (TO) 47QFCA21F0018 IS HEREBY AWARDED TO BOOZ ALLEN HAMILTON, INC. (BAH) TO PROVIDE ENTERPRISE LEVEL DATA TO THE OUSD(C), AND ITS STRATEGIC PARTNERS (I.E., DOD FOURTH ESTATE, DOD DEPARTMENTS, AND IC COMMUNITY).
TRANSFORMATION TWENTY-ONE TOTAL TECHNOLOGY NEXT GENERATION (T4NG) TASK ORDER - BENEFITS INTEGRATED DELIVERY

PRODUCT AND TECHNOLOGY ECOSYSTEM MANAGEMENT SERVICES (PTEMS)WHICH INCLUDES PRODUCT DELIVERY AND LIFECYCLE MANAGEMENT TO TRANSFORM VA BY TAPPING INTO EMERGING TECHNOLOGIES, CONNECTING DEVELOPERS WITH VA DATA, AND MAKING HUMAN CENTERED DESIGN

THE PURPOSE OF THIS EFFORT IS TO ACQUIRE CONTRACTOR SERVICES TO PROVIDE REAL-TIME, COMPREHENSIVE THREAT ANALYSIS AND ASSESSMENT, TRAINING DEVELOPMENT AND DELIVERY, READINESS AND MODERNIZATION SUPPORT, AND LOGISTICS AND EQUIPMENT SERVICES.
